name: miro
description: Create and read Miro boards from UR: spin up boards, generate diagrams, drop sticky-note clusters, and summarize a board — through Miro's official MCP server (OAuth) with a REST API fallback.

MIRO_MCP_URL.title: Miro MCP server URL
MIRO_MCP_URL.description: Official Miro MCP endpoint. Authentication is OAuth 2.1 with dynamic client registration on first connect; you pick the team to grant access to. Enterprise accounts need admin approval.
